children.text: A Dusknight residency. A kink, electronica & queer music party — the room turns red, the floor turns into cinder, and we don't stop 'til dawn.

children.text: no photo / no video. take care of each other. we honor request-for-removal and safer-space principles. if anything feels off, find a staff member with a red armband.
